Loading screen showing VICHYA DOMINION faction splash art featuring Jean Bart battleship. Purple/red background with faction lore text: 'A faction born out of the collapse of the Iris Orthodoxy...'. Bottom text says 'Update complete. Loading game...'
Same VICHYA DOMINION loading screen with Jean Bart. Progress bar at bottom showing loading status.
Azur Lane title screen featuring Enterprise with eagle. Social media buttons for Twitter, Facebook, Yostar on left. PRESS TO START text bottom right. Version VER 9.2.201 displayed.
Azur Lane title screen with server selection panel showing SERVER: Washington with Change button. OP button visible bottom left.

Announcements popup modal showing Patch Note for 3/19 Update. Event tab selected. Content mentions Project Identity 3.0: Explorer added. Three tabs at top: Event, System, News. Close X button top right.

Main game screen (lobby) with secretary shipgirl Friedrich der Große. Pink-themed bar background with MANJU JUICE bottle and wine glass visible. Player info: Kruzer Lv.143, resources showing oil 17677/17650, coins 48937, gems 4593. Bottom navigation bar with SHOP, DOCK, DEPOT, HQ, LAB, MISSIONS, BUILD, GUILD. Left sidebar has Handbook button. EVENT banner top right.

Main game screen with secretary shipgirl. Dark-haired character with horns holding wine glass. Dialogue text: 'Heehee... Will you come and visit me every night until the end of summer, my dear child?' Banner for 'Party Dress' event visible bottom left.

Main game screen with secretary shipgirl Friedrich der Große in full view. Character lounging on couch in evening wear. Chat message visible: 'player Zmey has invited you to ch'. Bottom navigation bar fully visible with all menu options.
Main menu with secretary ship. Banner shows 'Vows Available Now! 3/19-4/1' featuring Sirius. World chat shows 'Shiden Kai: [Headnod]'. Same layout with navigation bar and resource display.
Main menu with secretary ship. Banner shows 'Party Dress 3/19-4/8 Series Rerun Campaign'. Secretary ship has heart animation indicating affection. World chat shows 'Fujinon: [Headnod]'.

Main menu with secretary ship. Vows banner showing again with Sirius character. World chat shows 'NaKaDaShi: [Headnod]'.

Loading screen showing 'VICHYA DOMINION' faction art with battleship Jean Bart. Bottom text: 'Update complete. Loading game...'

Azur Lane title screen with Enterprise character art. Version 'VER 9.2.468' at bottom left. Social media buttons for Twitter, Facebook, Yostar on left. 'PRESS TO START' button at bottom right. CRIWARE logo at bottom right.
Same title screen with server selection dropdown showing 'SERVER: Washington' with 'Change' option. OP button added on left side.

Announcement popup with tabs: Event, System, News. Active tab shows 'Patch Note' dated 3/18/26. Content: 'Project Identity Update' - Project Identity 3.0: Explorer added. Guild Operations screen showing 'Ironbottom Maritime Defense' FLEET SELECT. Six chibi shipgirls displayed in formation. Left sidebar: Lobby, Members, Logistics, Tech, Operations (selected). Event details explain boss fleet rules. Event Rewards show blue and gold boxes. Cost 17677/10. 'DISPATCH FLEET' button at bottom. Auto Combat toggle at top right.

Info dialog popup over combat screen. Title 'Info' with Notified checkbox checked. Content: 'The following may occur when using auto combat:' with chibi character illustration and 'To Be Continued' arrow. 'Got it' button at bottom. Red X to close.

Login screen with Enterprise artwork. 'Login successful!' notification visible. Server Washington selected. Press to Start option.
Login screen. Same view with Enterprise and login successful message.
Login screen with Enterprise character. Login successful notification.
Main menu with Kruzer. Character has dialog text about being early to work.
note: Back to main menu after loading

Commission page. URGENT tab selected (highlighted with glowing border). Shows urgent commissions: NYB Gear Research (In action), Frontier Defense Patrol, Large-scale Oil Extraction III, Buoy Inspection.
Main menu with ship girl character. Banner showing Party Dress campaign.
Main menu. Character with different facial expression (smiling/closed eyes).
Main menu. Ship girl character with dialog text: Mission complete?! Are we allowed to just breeze through them?!
Main menu. Character with dialog: yawn... I got here before the working day started! Surprised?...
Main menu with Kruzer. Character with dialog: I am so sorry, Commander! I did not spill paint on your new carpet on purpose...
Main menu. Character with dialog: Lookie, Commander! That hole in the ground is shaped just like me!
